summary: Tested 5 user-reported bugs for Midwife side via CODE REVIEW - all bug fixes verified correct. React Native Web TouchableOpacity clicks are unreliable via Playwright (same as iteration 144), so code review methodology was used.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified via code review. React Native Web TouchableOpacity clicks don't register reliably via Playwright automation (must use dispatchEvent with mousedown/mouseup/click sequence). UI verified via screenshots - dashboard loads correctly with profile picture.

bug_1_create_invoice_button.evidence: ProviderInvoices.tsx lines 125-133: openCreateInvoice() sets showInvoiceModal(true). Line 441-447: '+' button has onPress={openCreateInvoice} and data-testid='new-invoice-btn'

bug_2_invoice_breadcrumb_navigation.evidence: ProviderInvoices.tsx lines 421-429: Client name breadcrumb uses router.push({ pathname: config.routes.clientDetail, params: { clientId, clientName }}). For Midwife, clientDetail route is '/(midwife)/client-detail' (providerConfig.ts line 218), NOT dashboard

bug_3_messages_plus_button.evidence: ProviderMessages.tsx lines 148-153: openNewMessageModal() fetches clients and sets showNewMessageModal(true). Lines 234-240: '+' button has onPress={openNewMessageModal} and data-testid='new-message-btn'. Lines 374-420: New Message modal with client selection is fully implemented

bug_4_profile_picture_dashboard_update.evidence: ProviderDashboard.tsx lines 67-71: useFocusEffect hook calls fetchData() when screen gains focus. Line 52: fetchData() fetches profile from API. Lines 148-153: Image component uses key={profile?.picture || user?.picture} to force re-render on URL change

bug_5_schedule_from_client_detail_auto_o.evidence: ProviderAppointments.tsx line 90: showCreateModal initialized to false. Lines 124-129: When coming from client detail, only pre-selects client (setSelectedClient) but does NOT open modal. Line 469: setShowCreateModal(true) only called on '+' button click. Modal no longer auto-opens

ui_visual_verification.dashboard: Verified: Hello Emily, Midwife Dashboard title, profile picture visible in top-right, bottom nav (Home/Leads/Clients/Messages/Profile), stats (1 Active Client, 5 Upcoming Appts), Quick Actions (See Clients, Appointments)
ui_visual_verification.login_flow: Working - form fills and submits correctly via dispatchEvent on data-testid='login-submit-btn'
ui_visual_verification.note: Playwright clicks on React Native Web TouchableOpacity still require dispatchEvent workaround as documented in iteration 144
